name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: They have my son,” Tywin Lannister said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin以‘他们抓住了我的儿子’开场，整场军议被Jaime被俘笼罩。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 开头‘my son’没有说Jaime；Tyrion下一段的心理补词揭开Tywin家庭情感排序。源文缺开引号，校勘时不擅自补写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “They do, my lord.” The messenger’s voice was dulled by exhaustion. On the breast of his torn surcoat, the brindled boar of Crakehall was half-obscured by dried blood.
blocks.explanation_zh: 筋疲力尽、负伤的Crakehall信使确认消息。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: One of your sons, Tyrion thought. He took a sip of wine and said not a word, thinking of Jaime. When he lifted his arm, pain shot through his elbow, reminding him of his own brief taste of battle. He loved his brother, but he would not have wanted to be with him in the Whispering Wood for all the gold in Casterly Rock.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion心想应是‘你的一个儿子’，显出Tywin心中Jaime与自己的地位差；他也承认自己关心Jaime，却庆幸没有同陷Whispering Wood。
blocks.literary_note_zh: One of your sons不是口头反抗，而是沉默的内心修正；Tyrion习惯把受伤隐藏在讥讽里。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: His lord father’s assembled captains and bannermen had fallen very quiet as the courier told his tale. The only sound was the crackle and hiss of the log burning in the hearth at the end of the long, drafty common room.
blocks.explanation_zh: captains和bannermen沉默听报，空旷旅店里只剩炉火声。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: After the hardships of the long relentless drive south, the prospect of even a single night in an inn had cheered Tyrion mightily . . . though he rather wished it had not been this inn again, with all its memories. His father had set a grueling pace, and it had taken its toll. Men wounded in the battle kept up as best they could or were abandoned to fend for themselves. Every morning they left a few more by the roadside, men who went to sleep never to wake. Every afternoon a few more collapsed along the way. And every evening a few more deserted, stealing off into the dusk. Tyrion had been half-tempted to go with them.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin军队急行南下付出伤亡、掉队和逃兵代价；Tyrion厌恶重返这家承载旧事的inn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 同一inn曾是Catelyn扣押Tyrion之处，如今innkeep被Tywin吊死；地点把私人旧怨与战争报复叠加。
blocks.background_zh: **the inn：** 这是Catelyn此前扣押Tyrion的crossroads inn；Tywin后来以报复性命令处死innkeep。

blocks.original_text: He had been upstairs, enjoying the comfort of a featherbed and the warmth of Shae’s body beside him, when his squire had woken him to say that a rider had arrived with dire news of Riverrun. So it had all been for nothing. The rush south, the endless forced marches, the bodies left beside the road . . . all for naught. Robb Stark had reached Riverrun days and days ago.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion原与Shae休息，却被Riverrun噩耗唤醒；强行军仍未赶在Robb之前。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “How could this happen?” Ser Harys Swyft moaned. “How? Even after the Whispering Wood, you had Riverrun ringed in iron, surrounded by a great host . . . what madness made Ser Jaime decide to split his men into three separate camps? Surely he knew how vulnerable that would leave them?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Harys Swyft把失败归咎于Jaime将围军分成三营。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Better than you, you chinless craven, Tyrion thought. Jaime might have lost Riverrun, but it angered him to hear his brother slandered by the likes of Swyft, a shameless lickspittle whose greatest accomplishment was marrying his equally chinless daughter to Ser Kevan, and thereby attaching himself to the Lannisters.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion在心中维护Jaime，并鄙视靠姻亲攀附Lannister的Swyft。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “I would have done the same,” his uncle responded, a good deal more calmly than Tyrion might have. “You have never seen Riverrun, Ser Harys, or you would know that Jaime had little choice in the matter. The castle is situated at the end of the point of land where the Tumblestone flows into the Red Fork of the Trident. The rivers form two sides of a triangle, and when danger threatens, the Tullys open their sluice gates upstream to create a wide moat on the third side, turning Riverrun into an island. The walls rise sheer from the water, and from their towers the defenders have a commanding view of the opposite shores for many leagues around. To cut off all the approaches, a besieger must needs place one camp north of the Tumblestone, one south of the Red Fork, and a third between the rivers, west of the moat. There is no other way, none.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan用两河汇流、sluice gates和三角地形说明Riverrun必须由三营分别封锁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三营不是Jaime随意分兵，而是Riverrun水利地形强迫围城者作出的结构性选择。
blocks.background_zh: **Riverrun：** Tully seat位于Tumblestone与Red Fork汇流尖端，可开sluice gates把第三面变为moat。

blocks.original_text: “Ser Kevan speaks truly, my lords,” the courier said. “We’d built palisades of sharpened stakes around the camps, yet it was not enough, not with no warning and the rivers cutting us off from each other. They came down on the north camp first. No one was expecting an attack. Marq Piper had been raiding our supply trains, but he had no more than fifty men. Ser Jaime had gone out to deal with them the night before . . . well, with what we thought was them. We were told the Stark host was east of the Green Fork, marching south . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: 信使确认有palisades也无济于事：北营无预警遭袭，Jaime此前被假情报和诱饵引走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “And your outriders?” Ser Gregor Clegane’s face might have been hewn from rock. The fire in the hearth gave a somber orange cast to his skin and put deep shadows in the hollows of his eyes. “They saw nothing? They gave you no warning?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Gregor追问outriders为何没有示警。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: The bloodstained messenger shook his head. “Our outriders had been vanishing. Marq Piper’s work, we thought. The ones who did come back had seen nothing.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 信使说斥候不断失踪，归来者也一无所见。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “A man who sees nothing has no use for his eyes,” the Mountain declared. “Cut them out and give them to your next outrider. Tell him you hope that four eyes might see better than two . . . and if not, the man after him will have six.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Gregor以挖眼威胁把侦察失败归结为恐怖惩罚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Gregor用递增的四眼、六眼制造黑色恐怖；惩罚无法补救情报体系本身的失败。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin Lannister turned his face to study Ser Gregor. Tyrion saw a glimmer of gold as the light shone off his father’s pupils, but he could not have said whether the look was one of approval or disgust. Lord Tywin was oft quiet in council, preferring to listen before he spoke, a habit Tyrion himself tried to emulate. Yet this silence was uncharacteristic even for him, and his wine was untouched.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin观察Gregor却不表态；异常沉默与未碰的wine暴露紧张。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin的face如mask，但sweat和untouched wine成为身体层面的反证。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “You said they came at night,” Ser Kevan prompted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan催信使继续讲夜袭经过。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: The man gave a weary nod. “The Blackfish led the van, cutting down our sentries and clearing away the palisades for the main assault. By the time our men knew what was happening, riders were pouring over the ditch banks and galloping through the camp with swords and torches in hand. I was sleeping in the west camp, between the rivers. When we heard the fighting and saw the tents being fired, Lord Brax led us to the rafts and we tried to pole across, but the current pushed us downstream and the Tullys started flinging rocks at us with the catapults on their walls. I saw one raft smashed to kindling and three others overturned, men swept into the river and drowned . . . and those who did make it across found the Starks waiting for them on the riverbanks.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Blackfish清除sentries和palisades后突袭北营；西营渡河救援又遭水流、投石机与Stark伏兵夹击。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 信使从败军视角重述此前Catelyn章节中的计划，读者现在看见同一行动如何摧毁对方组织。
blocks.background_zh: **Blackfish：** Brynden Tully，Robb的重要侦察与先锋指挥者；本次夜袭利用情报欺骗和河流隔离。

blocks.original_text: Ser Flement Brax wore a silver-and-purple tabard and the look of a man who cannot comprehend what he has just heard. “My lord father—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Flement Brax听到父亲命运，难以置信地发问。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Sorry, my lord,” the messenger said. “Lord Brax was clad in plate-and-mail when his raft overturned. He was very gallant.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 信使确认Lord Brax穿plate-and-mail落水身亡，并称其gallant。
blocks.literary_note_zh: messenger用gallant维护死者荣誉，Tyrion下一段却拆解贵族美化死亡的词汇。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: He was a fool, Tyrion thought, swirling his cup and staring down into the winy depths. Crossing a river at night on a crude raft, wearing armor, with an enemy waiting on the other side—if that was gallantry, he would take cowardice every time. He wondered if Lord Brax had felt especially gallant as the weight of his steel pulled him under the black water.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion拒绝把穿重甲夜渡急流称作勇敢，认为这种gallantry只是愚蠢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “The camp between the rivers was overrun as well,” the messenger was saying. “While we were trying to cross, more Starks swept in from the west, two columns of armored horse. I saw Lord Umber’s giant-in-chains and the Mallister eagle, but it was the boy who led them, with a monstrous wolf running at his side. I wasn’t there to see, but it’s said the beast killed four men and ripped apart a dozen horses. Our spearmen formed up a shieldwall and held against their first charge, but when the Tullys saw them engaged, they opened the gates of Riverrun and Tytos Blackwood led a sortie across the drawbridge and took them in the rear.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 西方两路Stark骑兵攻入河间营地，Robb与direwolf领军；Tytos Blackwood又从Riverrun出击夹后。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: **Riverrun sortie：** 城内Tytos Blackwood在围军迎击Stark骑兵时出城夹后，形成内外合击。

blocks.original_text: “Gods save us,” Lord Lefford swore.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lefford只能以一句祈祷回应灾情。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Greatjon Umber fired the siege towers we were building, and Lord Blackwood found Ser Edmure Tully in chains among the other captives, and made off with them all. Our south camp was under the command of Ser Forley Prester. He retreated in good order when he saw that the other camps were lost, with two thousand spears and as many bowmen, but the Tyroshi sellsword who led his freeriders struck his banners and went over to the foe.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Greatjon烧毁siege towers，Edmure等俘虏获救；南营有序撤退，但Tyroshi佣兵倒戈。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: **sellsword：** 为报酬作战的职业兵；Tyroshi首领在战局变化时倒戈，体现契约忠诚的不稳定。

blocks.original_text: “Curse the man.” His uncle Kevan sounded more angry than surprised. “I warned Jaime not to trust that one. A man who fights for coin is loyal only to his purse.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan说自己早警告Jaime不要信任只忠于钱袋的sellsword。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin军议听取Riverrun败报；Kevan解释地形，信使复盘Blackfish夜袭、三营覆灭与Jaime军瓦解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin wove his fingers together under his chin. Only his eyes moved as he listened. His bristling golden side-whiskers framed a face so still it might have been a mask, but Tyrion could see tiny beads of sweat dappling his father’s shaven head.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin仍像面具般静止，但光头上的汗珠泄露压力。
blocks.literary_note_zh: mask/sweat对比再次说明Tywin的控制并非无情，而是拒绝让情绪成为公开信息。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “How could it happen?” Ser Harys Swyft wailed again. “Ser Jaime taken, the siege broken . . . this is a catastrophe!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Swyft再次哀叹Jaime被俘、围城失败是catastrophe。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Ser Addam Marbrand said, “I am sure we are all grateful to you for pointing out the obvious, Ser Harys. The question is, what shall we do about it?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Addam讥讽Swyft只会重复显而易见的问题，要求讨论对策。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “What can we do? Jaime’s host is all slaughtered or taken or put to flight, and the Starks and the Tullys sit squarely across our line of supply. We are cut off from the west! They can march on Casterly Rock if they so choose, and what’s to stop them? My lords, we are beaten. We must sue for peace.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Swyft认为补给线被截、Casterly Rock受威胁，主张求和。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Peace?” Tyrion swirled his wine thoughtfully, took a deep draft, and hurled his empty cup to the floor, where it shattered into a thousand pieces. “There’s your peace, Ser Harys. My sweet nephew broke it for good and all when he decided to ornament the Red Keep with Lord Eddard’s head. You’ll have an easier time drinking wine from that cup than you will convincing Robb Stark to make peace now. He’s winning . . . or hadn’t you noticed?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion摔碎wine cup，把破杯比作Joffrey处决Eddard后再也拼不回的和平。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 摔碎cup把抽象的peace变成不可复原的物件；碎片在结尾还会再次出现。
blocks.background_zh: **broken peace：** Joffrey处决Eddard后，Lannister失去最重要的谈判人质，也把冲突升级为血仇。

blocks.original_text: “Two battles do not make a war,” Ser Addam insisted. “We are far from lost. I should welcome the chance to try my own steel against this Stark boy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Addam认为两次战斗尚不能决定战争，仍愿与Robb交锋。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Perhaps they would consent to a truce, and allow us to trade our prisoners for theirs,” offered Lord Lefford.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lefford提议停战并交换俘虏。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Unless they trade three-for-one, we still come out light on those scales,” Tyrion said acidly. “And what are we to offer for my brother? Lord Eddard’s rotting head?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion指出双方俘虏价值与数量不对等，Eddard已死更使Jaime无法交换。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “I had heard that Queen Cersei has the Hand’s daughters,” Lefford said hopefully. “If we give the lad his sisters back . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Lefford把Cersei掌握Sansa和Arya视作可能筹码。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Ser Addam snorted disdainfully. “He would have to be an utter ass to trade Jaime Lannister’s life for two girls.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Addam认为用两名女孩换Jaime极不划算，暴露贵族战争中的性别价值判断。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Addam衡量的是dynastic and military value，不是Sansa、Arya的人格价值；文本借此呈现战争交换的性别结构。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Then we must ransom Ser Jaime, whatever it costs,” Lord Lefford said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Lefford转而主张不惜代价赎回Jaime。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion rolled his eyes. “If the Starks feel the need for gold, they can melt down Jaime’s armor.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion讽刺Stark若缺gold，大可熔掉Jaime盔甲，说明赎金未必能买回战略人质。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “if we ask for a truce, they will think us weak,” Ser Addarn argued. “We should march on them at once.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Addam担心求和示弱，主张立即进军；原文此处保留小写开头与姓名拼写异常。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 源PDF写作小写‘if’及‘Addarn’，本文件保留并标为源页异常，不静默改写。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Surely our friends at court could be prevailed upon to join us with fresh troops,” said Ser Harys. “And someone might return to Casterly Rock to raise a new host.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Swyft建议向court求援，并回Casterly Rock另征新军。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 将领讨论求和、换俘和再战；Tyrion以碎杯指出Eddard之死已破坏和平，Tywin解散公开军议。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin Lannister rose to his feet. “They have my son,” he said once more, in a voice that cut through the babble like a sword through suet. “Leave me. All of you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin再次说‘他们抓住了我的儿子’，用一句命令结束嘈杂军议。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 重复开场句压过babble；Tywin不是被说服，而是决定从公开讨论转入私下决策。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Ever the soul of obedience, Tyrion rose to depart with the rest, but his father gave him a look. “Not you, Tyrion. Remain. And you as well, Kevan. The rest of you, out.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 众人离去时Tywin单独留下Tyrion和Kevan。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion eased himself back onto the bench, startled into speechlessness. Ser Kevan crossed the room to the wine casks. “Uncle,” Tyrion called, “if you would be so kind—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion惊讶坐回，向取酒的Kevan开口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Here.” His father offered him his cup, the wine untouched.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin把自己一口未饮的wine递给Tyrion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin把未饮wine递给Tyrion是一种罕见的亲近或实用信任信号，所以比正式称赞更令他惊讶。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Now Tyrion truly was nonplussed. He drank.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这罕见举动让Tyrion真正不知所措，只能喝下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin seated himself. “You have the right of it about Stark. Alive, we might have used Lord Eddard to forge a peace with Winterfell and Riverrun, a peace that would have given us the time we need to deal with Robert’s brothers. Dead . . . ” His hand curled into a fist. “Madness. Rank madness.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin承认Tyrion判断正确：活着的Eddard本可换来时间，处决他是rank madness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin承认Eddard作为活人质的价值，说明Joffrey的处决同时摧毁外交选择与Lannister leverage。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Joff’s only a boy,” Tyrion pointed out. “At his age, I committed a few follies of my own.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion以Joffrey年幼、自己年轻时也犯错为其辩护。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: His father gave him a sharp look. “I suppose we ought to be grateful that he has not yet married a whore.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin以Tyrion早年婚姻创伤反刺，表明并无温情宽容。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin用Tyrion旧婚姻羞辱回应‘boyish follies’，把Joffrey的国家级错误与儿子的私人创伤强行并列。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion sipped at his wine, wondering how Lord Tywin would look if he flung the cup in his face.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion想把杯子砸向Tywin，却只继续喝酒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Our position is worse than you know,” his father went on. “It would seem we have a new king.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说局势比表面更坏，因为又出现一位king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Ser Kevan looked poleaxed. “A new—who? What have they done to Joffrey?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan误以为Joffrey出事，惊问新王是谁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: The faintest flicker of distaste played across Lord Tywin’s thin lips. “Nothing . . . yet. My grandson still sits the Iron Throne, but the eunuch has heard whispers from the south. Renly Baratheon wed Margaery Tyrell at Highgarden this fortnight past, and now he has claimed the crown. The bride’s father and brothers have bent the knee and sworn him their swords.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说明Renly已娶Margaery Tyrell、称王，并得到Tyrell家宣誓效忠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Renly称王不是孤立宣言：与Margaery婚姻把Tyrell资源接入王位主张。
blocks.background_zh: **Renly–Tyrell alliance：** Renly与Margaery婚姻把Baratheon claim和Highgarden的军粮、人力及贵族网络结合。

blocks.original_text: “Those are grave tidings.” When Ser Kevan frowned, the furrows in his brow grew deep as canyons.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan意识到这是grave tidings。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “My daughter commands us to ride for King’s Landing at once, to defend the Red Keep against King Renly and the Knight of Flowers.” His mouth tightened. “Commands us, mind you. In the name of the king and council.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei命令Tywin军回King’s Landing防守；Tywin尤其不满女儿以king and council名义命令自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “How is King Joffrey taking the news?” Tyrion asked with a certain black amusement.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion带黑色幽默询问Joffrey如何反应。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Cersei has not seen fit to tell him yet,” Lord Tywin said. “She fears he might insist on marching against Renly himself.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说Cersei尚未告诉Joffrey，怕他冲动亲征Renly。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei隐瞒消息说明她也知道Joffrey冲动难控；形式上的king与实际信息控制发生分离。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “With what army?” Tyrion asked. “You don’t plan to give him this one, I hope?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion追问Joffrey能带哪支army，并反对交出当前主力。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “He talks of leading the City Watch,” Lord Tywin said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin说Joffrey想亲率City Watch。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “If he takes the Watch, he’ll leave the city undefended,” Ser Kevan said. “And with Lord Stannis on Dragonstone . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan指出带走Watch会使首都空虚，Dragonstone的Stannis也构成威胁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: **City Watch：** King’s Landing治安与城防力量；若被Joffrey带出，首都会直接失去关键守备。

blocks.original_text: “Yes.” Lord Tywin looked down at his son. “I had thought you were the one made for motley, Tyrion, but it would appear that I was wrong.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin讽刺真正适合穿motley的不是Tyrion而是Joffrey。
blocks.literary_note_zh: motley本属fool服饰；Tywin罕见地承认Tyrion比Joffrey更有判断力，但仍用讽刺表达。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Why, Father,” said Tyrion, “that almost sounds like praise.” He leaned forward intently. “What of Stannis? He’s the elder, not Renly. How does he feel about his brother’s claim?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion把这当近似赞美，并追问作为兄长的Stannis如何看Renly称王。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin私留Kevan和Tyrion，承认Joffrey犯下madness，并揭示Renly称王、Cersei失控及Lannister四面受敌。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: His father frowned. “I have felt from the beginning that Stannis was a greater danger than all the others combined. Yet he does nothing. Oh, Varys hears his whispers. Stannis is building ships, Stannis is hiring sellswords, Stannis is bringing a shadowbinder from Asshai. What does it mean? Is any of it true?” He gave an irritated shrug. “Kevan, bring us the map.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin认为Stannis最危险，却只有造船、招佣兵和请shadowbinder等未证实whispers，意图不明。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Stannis消息全由Varys whispers转述，造船等不能在当前段落当作已完全证实的事实。
blocks.background_zh: **shadowbinder：** 与Asshai神秘传统相关的称呼；此处只是Varys渠道的传闻，真实性尚未确认。

blocks.original_text: Ser Kevan did as he was bid. Lord Tywin unrolled the leather, smoothing it flat. “Jaime has left us in a bad way. Roose Bolton and the remnants of his host are north of us. Our enemies hold the Twins and Moat Cailin. Robb Stark sits to the west, so we cannot retreat to Lannisport and the Rock unless we choose to give battle. Jaime is taken, and his army for all purposes has ceased to exist. Thoros of Myr and Beric Dondarrion continue to plague our foraging parties. To our east we have the Arryns, Stannis Baratheon sits on Dragonstone, and in the south Highgarden and Storm’s End are calling their banners.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 地图显示Lannister军四面受敌：Bolton、Robb、Brotherhood、Arryns、Stannis、Highgarden与Storm’s End形成包围。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 地图把失败从一场battle扩大为战略包围：补给、撤退、侧后和首都威胁同时存在。
blocks.background_zh: **strategic enclosure：** Lannister军被北、西、东、南多方势力牵制，并失去向西安全退回Lannisport的通道。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion smiled crookedly. “Take heart, Father. At least Rhaegar Targaryen is still dead.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion以Rhaegar仍然死着开冷笑话，暗示至少没有更多王位竞争者。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “I had hoped you might have more to offer us than japes, Tyrion,” Lord Tywin Lannister said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin要求Tyrion贡献策略而非japes。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Ser Kevan frowned over the map, forehead creasing. “Robb Stark will have Edmure Tully and the lords of the Trident with him now. Their combined power may exceed our own. And with Roose Bolton behind us . . . Tywin, if we remain here, I fear we might be caught between three armies.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan判断Robb与riverlords合流后或已兵力占优，他们还可能被三军夹击。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “I have no intention of remaining here. We must finish our business with young Lord Stark before Renly Baratheon can march from Highgarden. Bolton does not concern me. He is a wary man, and we made him warier on the Green Fork. He will be slow to give pursuit. So . . . on the morrow, we make for Harrenhal. Kevan, I want Ser Addam’s outriders to screen our movements. Give him as many men as he requires, and send them out in groups of four. I will have no vanishings.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin决定次日去Harrenhal，先处理Robb；并命Addam的outriders掩护行军，避免再度失踪。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Harrenhal选择优先考虑中央位置与巨大防御潜力；curse是Kevan的文化解释，不是已证实因果。
blocks.background_zh: **Harrenhal：** Gods Eye附近的巨大城堡，民间称受诅咒；当前选择首先有军事与交通意义。

blocks.original_text: “As you say, my lord, but . . . why Harrenhal? That is a grim, unlucky place. Some call it cursed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan询问为何选择被传诅咒的Harrenhal。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Let them,” Lord Tywin said. “Unleash Ser Gregor and send him before us with his reavers. Send forth Vargo Hoat and his freeriders as well, and Ser Amory Lorch. Each is to have three hundred horse. Tell them I want to see the riverlands afire from the Gods Eye to the Red Fork.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin不理诅咒，命Gregor、Vargo Hoat和Amory Lorch带骑兵烧遍riverlands。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin的riverlands order是scorched-earth与terror strategy：不只打军队，也破坏敌方供给和政治秩序。
blocks.background_zh: **reavers：** 以袭掠、纵火和恐吓为任务的骑兵；Tywin让多个残酷指挥官系统性破坏riverlands。

blocks.original_text: “They will burn, my lord,” Ser Kevan said, rising. “I shall give the commands.” He bowed and made for the door.
blocks.explanation_zh: Kevan接受命令并离开传令。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: authorization of sexual violence and pillage. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：涉及授权性暴力与劫掠。段落位置保留。] Tywin还想把Tyrion的clansmen编入Vargo队伍。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 原段对性暴力和全面劫掠作明确授权，故不复录；这不是普通foraging，而是有意识地放任战争暴行。
blocks.background_zh: **内容安全：** 原段明确授权劫掠与性暴力，不复录；保留这是Tywin主动战争政策而非失控个案。

blocks.original_text: “Telling Shagga and Timett how to pillage is like telling a rooster how to crow,” Tyrion commented, “but I should prefer to keep them with me.” Uncouth and unruly they might be, yet the wildlings were his, and he trusted them more than any of his father’s men. He was not about to hand them over.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion说Shagga和Timett天生会劫掠，却坚持把这些属于自己的、不文明但可信的部下留在身边。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion保留clansmen既因信任，也因这些人是少数直接依附他个人而非Tywin家主权威的力量。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Then you had best learn to control them. I will not have the city plundered.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin要求他学会约束clansmen，因为不准他们劫掠即将前往的city。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “The city?” Tyrion was lost. “What city would that be?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion不明白所指是哪座city。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin决定转往Harrenhal并以reavers焚毁riverlands，随后揭晓Tyrion将被派往King’s Landing。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “King’s Landing. I am sending you to court.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin揭晓要把Tyrion派往King’s Landing的court。
blocks.literary_note_zh: court不是休闲宫廷，而是King’s Landing的权力中枢；上一句‘不准劫掠city’已暗示任务对象。
blocks.background_zh: **court mission：** Tyrion将进入King’s Landing权力中心，任务是代表Tywin纠正Joffrey、Cersei和council。

blocks.original_text: It was the last thing Tyrion Lannister would ever have anticipated.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这个任命完全超出Tyrion预料。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion受命Rule、约束Joffrey与council；‘You are my son’引发复杂解读，结尾他决定带Shae同行。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: He reached for his wine, and considered for a moment as he sipped. “And what am I to do there?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion饮酒思考后询问自己的职责。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion受命Rule、约束Joffrey与council；‘You are my son’引发复杂解读，结尾他决定带Shae同行。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Rule,” his father said curtly
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin只用一个词回答：Rule；原文缺句末标点，按源页保留。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Rule单词极短，重量却最大：Tywin授予职责而未给正式头衔，权力边界天然会与Cersei冲突。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion hooted with laughter. “My sweet sister might have a word or two to say about that!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion大笑，指出Cersei绝不会轻易让权。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion受命Rule、约束Joffrey与council；‘You are my son’引发复杂解读，结尾他决定带Shae同行。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “Let her say what she likes. Her son needs to be taken in hand before he ruins us all. I blame those jackanapes on the council—our friend Petyr, the venerable Grand Maester, and that cockless wonder Lord Varys. What sort of counsel are they giving Joffrey when he lurches from one folly to the next? Whose notion was it to make this Janos Slynt a lord? The man’s father was a butcher, and they grant him Harrenhal. Harrenhal, that was the seat of kings! Not that he will ever set foot inside it, if I have a say. I am told he took a bloody spear for his sigil. A bloody cleaver would have been my choice.” His father had not raised his voice, yet Tyrion could see the anger in the gold of his eyes. “And dismissing Selmy, where was the sense in that? Yes, the man was old, but the name of Barristan the Bold still has meaning in the realm. He lent honor to any man he served. Can anyone say the same of the Hound? You feed your dog bones under the table, you do not seat him beside you on the high bench.” He pointed a finger at Tyrion’s face. “If Cersei cannot curb the boy, you must. And if these councillors are playing us false . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin要Tyrion约束Joffrey、审查council，并批评封Janos Slynt为lord及罢免Barristan Selmy损害王权体面。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tywin批评Slynt和Selmy不是道德洁癖，而是封赏秩序与symbolic legitimacy：王权不能让职位失去含金量。
blocks.background_zh: **legitimacy symbols：** Harrenhal封爵、Kingsguard声望与sigil都向realm传递统治秩序；Tywin认为错误任免会贬值王权。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion knew. “Spikes,” he sighed. “Heads. Walls.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion用‘spikes、heads、walls’概括若councillors背叛时Tywin期待的处置。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion的三个名词已内化Tywin以公开处决制造服从的政治语言。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “I see you have taken a few lessons from me.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin认为Tyrion已学会自己的手段。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion受命Rule、约束Joffrey与council；‘You are my son’引发复杂解读，结尾他决定带Shae同行。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: “More than you know, Father,” Tyrion answered quietly. He finished his wine and set the cup aside, thoughtful. A part of him was more pleased than he cared to admit. Another part was remembering the battle upriver, and wondering if he was being sent to hold the left again. “Why me?” he asked, cocking his head to one side. “Why not my uncle? Why not Ser Addam or Ser Flement or Lord Serrett? Why not a . . . bigger man?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion既暗自高兴又怀疑自己像战场左翼一样只是危险任务的消耗品，于是追问为何选他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: hold the left回忆说明任命也可能是另一场把Tyrion放在最危险位置的考验。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Lord Tywin rose abruptly. “You are my son.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin突然回答：You are my son。
blocks.literary_note_zh: You are my son表面是Tyrion渴望的承认；其突然、冷硬和危局语境又使它可能只是血统义务。
blocks.background_zh: **没有正式头衔：** Tywin说Rule，却未在本段说明具体官职，因此Tyrion的法定权限仍待明确。

blocks.original_text: That was when he knew. You have given him up for lost, he thought. You bloody bastard, you think Jaime’s good as dead, so I’m all you have left. Tyrion wanted to slap him, to spit in his face, to draw his dagger and cut the heart out of him and see if it was made of old hard gold, the way the smallfolks said. Yet he sat there, silent and still.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion却把这句话理解为Tywin已放弃Jaime，自己只是仅剩选择；强烈愤怒仍被压在沉默中。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion的解释不等于Tywin已明说放弃Jaime，但开头my son与此处任命使这种推断非常有文本依据。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: The shards of the broken cup crunched beneath his father’s heels as Lord Tywin crossed the room. “One last thing,” he said at the door. “You will not take the whore to court.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Tywin踩过碎杯离开，并禁止Tyrion带Shae去court。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 碎杯在Tywin脚下crunch，视觉上把他走过自己家族造成的broken peace。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Tyrion sat alone in the common room for a long while after his father was gone. Finally he climbed the steps to his cozy garret beneath the bell tower. The ceiling was low, but that was scarcely a drawback for a dwarf. From the window, he could see the gibbet his father had erected in the yard. The innkeep’s body turned slowly on its rope whenever the night wind gusted. Her flesh had grown as thin and ragged as Lannister hopes.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion独坐后回到低矮garret；窗外被Tywin吊死的innkeep如同破败的Lannister hopes。
blocks.literary_note_zh: innkeep尸体与Lannister hopes明喻把Tywin暴力后果、军局衰败和地点记忆合成一个结尾意象。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: Shae murmured sleepily and rolled toward him when he sat on the edge of the featherbed. He slid his hand under the blanket and cupped a soft breast, and her eyes opened. “M’lord,” she said with a drowsy smile.
blocks.explanation_zh: Shae醒来，以亲密方式回应Tyrion。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion受命Rule、约束Joffrey与council；‘You are my son’引发复杂解读，结尾他决定带Shae同行。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。

blocks.original_text: When he felt her nipple stiffen, Tyrion kissed her. “I have a mind to take you to King’s Landing, sweetling,” he whispered.
blocks.explanation_zh: Tyrion决定违抗父命，把Shae带去King’s Landing。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tyrion刚得到统治使命便决定违反父亲的私人禁令；自主性与判断风险同时开始。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须展开的设定；重点在Riverrun败局、Lannister战略包围、Tywin的统治方式及Tyrion对父子关系的解读。
